summary: White House event footage of Steve Ronnebeck, the father of murder victim Grant Ronnebeck, delivering remarks at a podium while President Trump stands beside him, with a White House lower-third promoting a text-for-updates number. It is a lightly-edited recording of an emotional speech with no music or stylized treatment. Out of scope as a raw event/speech clip.
notable_text: TEXT "POTUS" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE; THE WHITE HOUSE
